selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel path-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the path contract parent into controller-facing fences for finite atemporal path handling, guarded weak concatenation, anti-equivalence and anti-inverse shortcuts, anti-scalar-governance, anti-endpoint collapse, anti-recurrence import, and anti-topology/anti-geometry completion.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the path boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the path-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: PATHS_ARE_FINITE_ATEMPORAL_SCOPED_AND_PLURAL
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's admitted path object class without importing dynamics or canon.

candidate_items.name: CONCATENATION_STAYS_GUARDED_AND_PATH_SHORTCUTS_STAY_BLOCKED
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps path composition local and weak instead of silently algebraized.

candidate_items.name: SCALAR_OVERLAYS_CANNOT_GOVERN_ADMISSIBILITY_OR_CANONICAL_CHOICE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's direct guard against hidden optimization or selection machinery.

candidate_items.name: ENDPOINTS_DO_NOT_COLLAPSE_PATH_MEANING
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps path plurality and order sensitivity visible even when endpoint talk is present.

candidate_items.name: PATHS_DO_NOT_IMPORT_RECURRENCE_TOPOLOGY_GEOMETRY_OR_SEMANTIC_COMPLETION
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-path-space and anti-semantic-completion posture into a controller-facing fence.

quarantined_items.name: PATH_LANGUAGE_AS_TRAJECTORY_OR_CANONICAL_ROUTE_DOCTRINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows path encodings while explicitly denying trajectory, endpoint-collapse, and canonical-route semantics.

quarantined_items.name: PATH_LANGUAGE_AS_OPTIMIZATION_OR_PATH_SPACE_COMPLETION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it keeps path structure at the finite encoding layer and blocks scalar, topological, geometric, and semantic completion.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-first controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
